philosophy.childled.title: Child-Led Learning
philosophy.childled.desc: We follow the child's curiosity. Activities are designed to engage, not enforce.
philosophy.values.title: Values First
philosophy.values.desc: Respect, discipline, gratitude — these are not rules, they are habits we build daily.
philosophy.doing.title: Learn by Doing
philosophy.doing.desc: Worksheets alone don't teach. We learn through touch, movement, colour, and experience.
philosophy.parents.title: Parent Partnership
philosophy.parents.desc: We keep parents informed and involved — because education happens at home too.
philosophy.culture.title: Cultural Rootedness
philosophy.culture.desc: Indian heritage, stories, and festivals are woven into daily learning — not as a subject, but as a way of life.
philosophy.safe.title: Safe & Nurturing
philosophy.safe.desc: Every child should feel safe, seen, and celebrated. Our classroom is their second home.
